Title: Create and install an F1 inspired MCP Server in VS Code
Author: Visual Studio Code
Description:
In this video Liam will show you how to create and install a Formula 1 inspired MCP Server in Python using the FastMCP library. He explains and shows you the client/server model, the transport used with STDIO, tool discovery, tool invocation and the schema discipline.

🔗 Repo: https://github.com/liamchampton/f1-race-engineer-mcp

🤝 Connect with Liam: https://www.linkedin.com/in/liam-conroy-hampton/

#vscode #mcpserver
